description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/colinduquesnoy/mellowplayer/build-images/linux:qt515 for Linux jobs (tagged linux) and sets QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen, defines an APP_VERSION=3.7.0 variable, and three stages: build, tests, deploy. In the build stage add a build:debug job that runs ./scripts/ci/linux/build-debug.sh and publishes the build/ directory as a build-debug artifact, a build:release job that runs ./scripts/ci/linux/build-release.sh and publishes the build/ directory as a build-release artifact, and a build:release:no-gold-linker job that runs ./scripts/ci/linux/build-release-no-gold-linker.sh without artifacts. In the tests stage add a coverage job that depends on build:debug, runs ./scripts/ci/linux/coverage.sh and after_script uploads coverage info with bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -t "${CODECOV_TOKEN}" -f build/coverage.info.cleaned, a lint job that runs ./scripts/ci/linux/lint.sh and is allowed to fail, and a test job that depends on build:release and runs ./scripts/ci/linux/tests.sh. In the deploy stage add a pages job using alpine:latest that runs echo 'Nothing to do...' and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
